name: Jengish Chokusu (Peak Pobeda)
fact: The highest mountain in Kyrgyzstan and the highest peak of the Tian Shan mountain range.

name: Khan Tengri
fact: One of the most famous peaks of the Tian Shan mountains, known for its beautiful pyramid shape and challenging climbs.

name: Lenin Peak
fact: A famous mountain in the Pamir-Alay range and one of the easiest 7000-meter peaks to climb, attracting mountaineers from around the world.

name: Karakol Peak
fact: A prominent peak near Karakol city, popular among climbers and hikers for its impressive glaciers and alpine scenery.

name: Uchitel Peak
fact: A well-known mountain near the Ala-Archa National Park, popular for trekking and mountaineering.

name: Ala-Kul Pass
fact: A high mountain pass near Ala-Köl Lake, famous for its spectacular views of the surrounding Tian Shan peaks.
